project_name: GE/2026/14 — Ground Investigation, Man-made Slopes (Surface Drainage Water Study)

packages.scope_summary: Drainage field test — manufacture, mobilise and set up the test rig, carry out the test at each location, supply water, provide and remove freeboard, and drainage modification (demolition and U-channel), measured per the Method of Measurement.

sor_items.description: Manufacture the set up of drainage field test
Mobilise full set of drainage field test set up on land
Set up at each test location and carry out drainage field test
Purchase and supply water for drainage field test (private source or WSD)
Extra over G14 for plan distance over 300m and/or elevation over 30m
Drainage modification — demolish artificial hard material
Drainage modification — construct U-channel (Std Dwg C2409J, C2413D)

packages.scope_summary: Rotary drilling in soil and rock and provision of borehole casing, to the scheduled depths.

sor_items.description: Rotary drilling in soil and rock
Provision and installation of borehole casing

packages.scope_summary: Undisturbed and disturbed sampling from drillholes, to the schedule.
